# Self-test for mcp-scripttest-server
# This test verifies that the scripttest server correctly handles basic operations

# Start the scripttest server with basic configuration
mcp-scripttest-server -script testdata/server_scripts/basic.txt -port 8081 &
sleep 1

# Test initialization
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}}
stdout '"name":"mcp-scripttest-server"'
stdout '"version":"1.0.0"'

# Test echo functionality
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"echo","params":{"message":"Hello, World!"}}
stdout '"message":"Hello, World!"'

# Test variable substitution
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"echo_id","params":{"message":"Test"}}
stdout '"message":"Echo ID: 3"'

# Test counter functionality
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"counter_test"}
stdout '"count":1'

# Test counter again - should increment
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"counter_test"}
stdout '"count":2'

# Test conditional response based on counter
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"rate_limited"}
stdout '"status":"success"'

# Hit the rate limit
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"rate_limited"}
stdout '"error"'
stdout '"code":-32429'
stdout '"message":"Rate limit exceeded"'

# Test unmatched request handling
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"unknown_method"}
stdout '"error"'
stdout '"message":"Unexpected request: no matching pattern in script"'

# Test file creation via exec commands
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"create_file","params":{"path":"test.txt","content":"File content"}}
stdout '"status":"success"'

# Verify file was created correctly
mcp-send -addr localhost:8081 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"read_file","params":{"path":"test.txt"}}
stdout '"content":"File content"'

# Stop the server
killall mcp-scripttest-server

-- testdata/server_scripts/basic.txt --
# Basic test script for the scripttest server

# Initialize response
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize"}
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","serverInfo":{"name":"mcp-scripttest-server","version":"1.0.0"},"capabilities":{}}}

# Echo service
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"echo","params":{"message":"*"}}
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"message":"${REQUEST.params.message}"}}

# Echo with ID substitution
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"echo_id"}
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"message":"Echo ID: ${ID}"}}

# Counter test
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"counter_test"}
counter TEST_COUNTER
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"count":${TEST_COUNTER}}}

# Rate limiting example
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"rate_limited"}
counter RATE_LIMIT
if RATE_LIMIT > 1
  send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"error":{"code":-32429,"message":"Rate limit exceeded"}}
else
  send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"status":"success"}}
endif

# File creation
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"create_file","params":{"path":"*","content":"*"}}
exec mkdir -p $(dirname ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path})
exec echo "${REQUEST.params.content}" > ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path}
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"status":"success","path":"${REQUEST.params.path}"}}

# File reading
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"read_file","params":{"path":"*"}}
set-var FILE_CONTENT = $(cat ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path})
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"path":"${REQUEST.params.path}","content":"${FILE_CONTENT}"}}
